# Descrição do Repositório GitHub

## 📝 Descrição Curta (para GitHub)

```
Sistema MLOps automatizado para ranking tático de ações da B3 usando Machine Learning (DeepAR). Pipeline completo com ingestão em tempo real, feature engineering, treinamento automático e dashboard interativo. Economia de $216-288/ano vs QuickSight.
```


## 📋 About Section (Sobre)

### Português
```
🤖 Sistema MLOps completo para análise quantitativa e ranking de ações da B3
📊 Pipeline automatizado: ingestão → feature engineering → treinamento → predição
💰 Custo-efetivo: ~$27-43/mês na AWS (economia de $216-288/ano)
📈 Dashboard interativo no GitHub Pages (gratuito)
🔄 Deploy automatizado com AWS CDK + GitHub Actions
```

### English
```
🤖 Complete MLOps system for quantitative analysis and ranking of B3 stocks
📊 Automated pipeline: ingestion → feature engineering → training → prediction
💰 Cost-effective: ~$27-43/month on AWS (saves $216-288/year)
📈 Interactive dashboard on GitHub Pages (free)
🔄 Automated deployment with AWS CDK + GitHub Actions
```

## 🎯 Features (para README badges)

- ✅ Real-time data ingestion (5-minute intervals)
- ✅ Automated ML pipeline (feature engineering, hyperparameter tuning, training)
- ✅ DeepAR forecasting models on Amazon SageMaker
- ✅ Ensemble predictions with optimized weights
- ✅ Drift detection and monitoring
- ✅ Interactive React dashboard (GitHub Pages)
- ✅ CloudWatch monitoring and SNS alerts
- ✅ Infrastructure as Code (AWS CDK)
- ✅ CI/CD with GitHub Actions
- ✅ Cost-optimized (~$27-43/month)

## 💡 Use Cases

1. **Quantitative Trading**: Automated stock ranking for tactical allocation
2. **Research**: Academic research on ML for financial markets
3. **Learning**: Educational resource for MLOps and AWS
4. **Portfolio Management**: Data-driven stock selection
5. **Risk Management**: Monitoring and drift detection
